content:
God of Slaughter

Chapter 1503: Great Seal Technique

Translator: Sigma_ Editor: Hitesh_

Reincarnation Island, Kyara Sea, Endless Sea...

It was the island the Xia family stayed and cultivated on. Yang Tian Emperor had arranged the Xia family to stay on that island. There were several exquisite and comfortable bamboo houses on the shore of Reincarnation Island, and Xia Xin Yan was cultivating precisely there.

The warriors of the Fighting League also lived on Reincarnation Island. Feng Han, Feng Yan, and Qin Ze had considered the island their new homes.

They all knew of the horrible massacre in Desolate Territory, and it would be really hard to go back there. Thus, they had to adapt to the strange and new conditions here.

A silhouette landed on the Reincarnation Island, walking directly to where Xia Xin Yan was cultivating. He was DeCarlos, the grandmaster of Space power Upanishad.

Xia Xin Yan wore an elegant, long, green dress, facing the deep blue sea. Seeing DeCarlos, she was quite surprised. “Are you here to see me? For what, sir?”

DeCarlos sighed inwardly as he took out a thin, small book. The cover of the book had many complicated, twisted space lines with clear space energy emitting from it. “You should read and comprehend the Space power Upanishad in this book. Your own power Upanishad and the Space power Upanishad can cast the Great Seal Technique my teacher had comprehended that year...”

He told her his teacher’s wish, then said, “I don’t dream to be your teacher, because I know I’m not qualified. But, I’m begging you to cultivate the Space power Upanishad, so that you can use this inheritance from my master.” He said solemnly.

Xia Xin Yan was surprised. When DeCarlos gifted her a huge amount of God power, she was skeptical about his motivation. She thought he had some plan she didn’t have a clue about. She was alert, as she thought he had some rebellious scheme. And now, she finally got it, making her respect him more.

To fulfill his teacher’s wish, DeCarlos had given away such a treasure, which surprised Xia Xin Yan a lot.

She raised her hands as she wanted to receive the thin book.

Swoosh!

But at that moment, a petite figure suddenly appeared. She smiled and grabbed the book. When she held it, her face looked strange. “That Great Sea something sounds interesting to me. Let’s see if the Space power Upanishad is worth cultivating...”

She was Montecie, the Territory Ancestor Realm experts of the Phantom Clan. At this moment, she was the key person who protected the Grace Mainland from the dangers in the chaotic space basin.

While hovering in the clouds of the Grace Mainland, she noticed a man approached Xia Xin Yan. As she had considered Xia Xin Yan her only disciple, she planned to take to Shi Yan about this. She had decided to impart Xia Xin Yan her Time power Upanishad inheritance.

She saw DeCarlos give Xia Xin Yan a thin book, asking her to cultivate Space power Upanishad, which rang alarm bells for her immediately.

Xia Xin Yan had cultivated Time power Upanishad to a high realm, but it wasn’t a good move to cultivate Space power Upanishad now. Montecie thought that it would affect Xia Xin Yan’s development. Thus, she couldn’t help but come and interfere in this.

“Fusing Time and Space to create the Sea of Time and Space, freezing both Time and Space...”

Montecie wore a disdainful face, but after reading the little book for a while, she was shaken inwardly as her eyes brightened. “It’s an interesting idea. Oh wow! There’s even a clear sequence. Not bad, not bad! It’s possible indeed!”

Then, she said, “Little girl, you don’t need to cultivate the Space power Upanishad. Mixing power Upanishads will affect your progress. As you’ve cultivating only one power Upanishad, you’re a gold ore that hasn’t been refined. After I’ve shaped you, you will achieve excellent attainments.” Montecie held the book, turning to DeCarlos and talking faintly, “As for this Great Seal Technique, I will talk to Shi Yan to see if he’s interested in trying it out with me.”

DeCarlos’ face froze.

Montecie was at the Second Sky of Territory Ancestor Realm. She was the peerless existence in the Sea Domain of Nihility. How could DeCarlos rebel against her? What did he have to fight with her?

He looked sorrowful, standing baffled as he didn’t know what or how to retort. He could only sigh.

“You come here...” Montecie twisted a tuft of her hair around her finger, sending Shi Yan a message.

Not far from them, Shi Yan was explaining the current situation to Shang Chen, Yu Shan, and the others. He received the message, so he comforted the group of warriors and left for the Reincarnation Island.

“Precursor Montecie, why did you call me here?” Shi Yan came, then walked to Xia Xin Yan and beamed. “Oh, I got it. You come here to ask for my girl. Haha, since I’ve known you cultivate Time power Upanishad, I wanted to ask you to take her as your disciple. Seems like you have the same idea, don’t you?”

“Xin Yan, precursor Montecie is a peerless expert in Time power Upanishad. It’s very good for you to follow her.” Shi Yan said with a stern face. “In this vast universe, only she has cultivated the Time power Upanishad to the Territory Ancestor Realm. You shouldn’t let this chance slip away no matter what!”

Xia Xin Yan was moved, her eyes turning bright. Seconds later, she smiled while bowing to the other, “I wonder if I have this fortune, precursor?”

“Ah haha!” Montecie laughed cheerily. “It’s hard for you to find a master teaching Time power Upanishad, and it’s the same for me to find a good disciple! From the moment I saw you, I had made up my mind. Even if this kid Shi Yan didn’t want it and I had to steal you, I would have done that for sure!”

Hearing her, Xia Xin Yan smiled sweetly, “So, teacher agrees to accept me?”

“Of course, I agree!” Montecie was happy. She handed Shi Yan the thin book. “Look, this technique’s really interesting, using the Space and Time power Upanishad to seal space and stop time. It’s an absolute seal. According to the author, if the experts cultivating Space and Time power Upanishads cooperate, the seal can confine an entire territory. It’s similar to the permanent icy seal...”

Shi Yan was surprised. He received the book and studied it carefully.

DeCarlos and Ming Hao’s teacher was a legendary expert. He used to be a grandmaster in Space power Upanishad, reaching a remarkable peak. He had fought against Bloodthirsty and been defeated. Afterward, the Corrosion power Upanishad had eroded him to death.

After his defeat, he had spent the short remaining course of his life in seeking a way to deal with Bloodthirsty.

The technique in this thin book was a fatal attack he had created. It required fusing the Space and Time power Upanishad to cast the Great Seal that could seal everything, be it space or a speck of dust!

According to him, the expert had to use Space power Upanishad to create a small space to confine the target and then seal that space completely.

The space confinement could hold the creature’s body, but it couldn’t stop the soul. In other words, a creature with intellect could use the soul energy, which meant it could use the Dark Energy to crush that space.

However, if the expert sealed even time during this process...

When time stopped, the creatures’ thoughts and soul were fixed. The soul would be paused in a specific moment, so, that confined creature couldn’t think or use soul energy.

Space would confine the body, and time would pause the thoughts. When the two power Upanishads were used at the same time, together, they could lock both the body and the soul of the target, which would be a true seal.

The target wouldn’t be able to use the body’s energy, and his instinctive reaction wouldn’t be able to tear the confining space. At the same time, his soul wouldn’t be able to think to urge the power Upanishad or the Dark Energy to shatter his confinement. He would be imprisoned in a fixed time and space; unless someone helped him, the target would never wake up.

Theoretically, if the experts were strong enough to cast this Great Seal, they could confine not only some creatures, but also the entire territory with planets and gases!

“Although your teacher is gone, the technique he had invented is really fierce,” Shi Yan studied the book, and his face changed. “It’s lucky that your teacher didn’t cultivate Time power Upanishad. Otherwise, once he could cast that Great Seal, even if Bloodthirsty hadn’t been killed by the God clan, your teacher would have been able to seal him entirely.”

“You should learn the technique. Perhaps, we will need it later. Anyway, you don’t need to cultivate the two power Upanishads at the same time, as the two experts cultivating the two specific power Upanishads could join hands to create the same effects.” Montecie smiled gently and tiptoed to pat Shi Yan’s shoulder. “Don’t worry! I’ll impart Xin Yan the power Upanishad. Later on, you guys can join hand to seal anyone you hate. How does that sound?”

She wouldn’t take that book, as she thought that it would be better to let Shi Yan keep it, in case Xia Xin Yan was moved and she wanted to cultivate Space power Upanishad, which would slow her progress in learning the Time power Upanishad.

“Follow me, we should find a place to talk.” Montecie lovingly hooked Xia Xin Yan’s arm, bringing her and surfing above the sea with a bright and wide smile. They looked like a little sister clutching on her big sister. With her petite figure of a little girl, she didn’t look like a teacher at all.

“You should keep this small book and seek for your disciple to cultivate the Space power Upanishad. The Sea Domain of Nihility is really vast. You will get more chances.” Waiting for Montecie to leave, Shi Yan tucked the thin book into DeCarlos’ hand. “Xia Xin Yan and I are different. It’s late for her to cultivate another power Upanishad...”

DeCarlos forced a smile. He nodded, then turned away and left.

Shi Yan frowned, still thinking about the Great Seal using both Space and Time power Upanishads. He understood that this technique created by DeCarlos’ teacher was really terrifying. He wanted to try to see if it could work out.

If it worked, this absolute seal would be very useful, and could even change the world...
